sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73282" key="o(loskwlhko/brwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-σκωληκόβρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73282.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">entirely eaten by worms,POsl.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:26:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.14</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(i B. C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
